Activity.description: Transformation. Consumes input entities, applies an interpretation under stated assumptions, emits output entities. Hyperedge in the hyperDAG topology. Activities do not participate in conversations — they record how a step of reasoning happened.

admissibility_rationale.description: Why this Activity is valid given its inputs and viewpoint.

generation_mode.description: Free-form descriptor of the process that generated this entity (parser name + version, viewpoint name + version, LLM model + tier).

inputs.description: Input entity IDs consumed by this Activity.

outputs.description: New entities produced by this Activity. May be empty for declarative edges (SUPPORT, CONTRADICTION) whose output is the Activity itself.

provenance.description: Provenance description for v1. Future versions will model provenance as structured edges into the hyperDAG; for now a free-form string is accepted to allow ingestion bundles from upstream extraction tools.

scope.description: Optional but recommended. Sets the conditions under which this entity's statements apply. Unset dimensions are operationally `unspecified`, not wildcards.

should_not_claim.description: Epistemic boundaries this entity must respect. Combination of per-class defaults plus directive-imposed rules from the viewpoint.

type.description: For Object and EvidenceRecord, a CURIE into a viewpoint vocabulary. For Activity, a CURIE corresponding to the ActivityType value (e.g. isom:activity_type/synthesis_edge).

viewpoint_directive_id.description: Reference to the ViewpointDirective that shaped this entity. The bootstrap meta-viewpoint and the blank-slate viewpoint are valid references; absence is not.

Activity.title: Activity

ActivityType.description: Structural type of an Activity (hyperedge in the topology).
ActivityType.title: ActivityType

BboxLocator.description: Axis-aligned bounding box on a rasterized page.

locator_type.description: Class name of the concrete Locator subclass (e.g. CharRangeLocator).

BboxLocator.title: BboxLocator

BiologicalScope.description: Organism, tissue, cell line, developmental stage.
BiologicalScope.title: BiologicalScope

CharRangeLocator.description: Character range within extracted text of a source artifact.

locator_type.description: Class name of the concrete Locator subclass (e.g. CharRangeLocator).

CharRangeLocator.title: CharRangeLocator

CompatibilityJudgment.description: A recorded compatibility judgment over a set of entities/evidence.
CompatibilityJudgment.title: CompatibilityJudgment

CompositeLocator.description: A locator that combines multiple sub-locators.

locator_type.description: Class name of the concrete Locator subclass (e.g. CharRangeLocator).

CompositeLocator.title: CompositeLocator

Confidence.description: Structured confidence carrying calibration metadata. A calibrated confidence outside its calibration_domain or under a different viewpoint is no longer calibrated — downstream consumers must downgrade to heuristic.

calibration_scope.description: The data distribution under which the confidence was calibrated.

confidence_domain.description: The input domain where the calibration applies.

value.description: Numeric confidence; semantics depend on confidence_basis.

viewpoint_directive_id.description: Viewpoint under which calibration was performed.

Confidence.title: Confidence

ConfidenceBasis.description: Source semantics of a confidence value.
ConfidenceBasis.title: ConfidenceBasis

ContentReference.description: Content-addressed reference to externally stored content. Identity by uri + sha256 + hash_mode. At resolution time, the system fetches uri, recomputes the hash under hash_mode, and refuses to use the content if the hash does not match.

uri.description: Locator (file path, https URL, did:..., cid:...).

ContentReference.title: ContentReference

Entity.description: Abstract base for all ISOM entities. Carries the discipline contract: identity, type, viewpoint, provenance, lifecycle, review state, should_not_claim, scope, generation mode. Three concrete subclasses: Object, Activity, EvidenceRecord.

generation_mode.description: Free-form descriptor of the process that generated this entity (parser name + version, viewpoint name + version, LLM model + tier).

provenance.description: Provenance description for v1. Future versions will model provenance as structured edges into the hyperDAG; for now a free-form string is accepted to allow ingestion bundles from upstream extraction tools.

scope.description: Optional but recommended. Sets the conditions under which this entity's statements apply. Unset dimensions are operationally `unspecified`, not wildcards.

should_not_claim.description: Epistemic boundaries this entity must respect. Combination of per-class defaults plus directive-imposed rules from the viewpoint.

type.description: For Object and EvidenceRecord, a CURIE into a viewpoint vocabulary. For Activity, a CURIE corresponding to the ActivityType value (e.g. isom:activity_type/synthesis_edge).

viewpoint_directive_id.description: Reference to the ViewpointDirective that shaped this entity. The bootstrap meta-viewpoint and the blank-slate viewpoint are valid references; absence is not.

Entity.title: Entity

EpistemicStatus.description: Epistemic label on a consequential statement.
EpistemicStatus.title: EpistemicStatus

EvidenceRecord.description: Grounded data anchored to a single source artifact via a typed locator. The citable unit. EvidenceRecords are referenced by Objects' evidence_record_ids and by Activities' inputs; they do not initiate threads or posts.

cited_from.description: Identifier or marker for prior evidence this record derives from or cites. May be `unknown_external` when citation resolution has not happened.

evidence_type.description: Either a value from EvidenceTypeBase (e.g. isom:text_span) or a CURIE into a viewpoint-extended evidence vocabulary.

generation_mode.description: Free-form descriptor of the process that generated this entity (parser name + version, viewpoint name + version, LLM model + tier).

normalized_payload.description: Viewpoint-defined structured payload, serialized as a JSON string in v1.

provenance.description: Provenance description for v1. Future versions will model provenance as structured edges into the hyperDAG; for now a free-form string is accepted to allow ingestion bundles from upstream extraction tools.

scope.description: Optional but recommended. Sets the conditions under which this entity's statements apply. Unset dimensions are operationally `unspecified`, not wildcards.

should_not_claim.description: Epistemic boundaries this entity must respect. Combination of per-class defaults plus directive-imposed rules from the viewpoint.

source_artifact_ref.description: Single source artifact this evidence is extracted from.

type.description: For Object and EvidenceRecord, a CURIE into a viewpoint vocabulary. For Activity, a CURIE corresponding to the ActivityType value (e.g. isom:activity_type/synthesis_edge).

viewpoint_directive_id.description: Reference to the ViewpointDirective that shaped this entity. The bootstrap meta-viewpoint and the blank-slate viewpoint are valid references; absence is not.

EvidenceRecord.title: EvidenceRecord

EvidenceTypeBase.description: Built-in evidence categories. Viewpoints may extend evidence_type with additional CURIEs, but these base values are structural and always available.
EvidenceTypeBase.title: EvidenceTypeBase

FileRegionLocator.description: Byte range within an opaque binary artifact.

locator_type.description: Class name of the concrete Locator subclass (e.g. CharRangeLocator).

FileRegionLocator.title: FileRegionLocator

HashMode.description: How a ContentReference's sha256 is computed.
HashMode.title: HashMode

LineageType.description: Independence classification of an evidence record.
LineageType.title: LineageType

Locator.description: Polymorphic locator into a source artifact. Discriminator is locator_type.

locator_type.description: Class name of the concrete Locator subclass (e.g. CharRangeLocator).

Locator.title: Locator

NegativeEvidenceRecord.description: First-class record of a search that returned no result under stated scope. Distinct from `unknown` (question not considered) and from `not_searched` (in scope but not attempted).

cited_from.description: Identifier or marker for prior evidence this record derives from or cites. May be `unknown_external` when citation resolution has not happened.

evidence_type.description: Either a value from EvidenceTypeBase (e.g. isom:text_span) or a CURIE into a viewpoint-extended evidence vocabulary.

generation_mode.description: Free-form descriptor of the process that generated this entity (parser name + version, viewpoint name + version, LLM model + tier).

normalized_payload.description: Viewpoint-defined structured payload, serialized as a JSON string in v1.

provenance.description: Provenance description for v1. Future versions will model provenance as structured edges into the hyperDAG; for now a free-form string is accepted to allow ingestion bundles from upstream extraction tools.

scope.description: Optional but recommended. Sets the conditions under which this entity's statements apply. Unset dimensions are operationally `unspecified`, not wildcards.

should_not_claim.description: Epistemic boundaries this entity must respect. Combination of per-class defaults plus directive-imposed rules from the viewpoint.

source_artifact_ref.description: Single source artifact this evidence is extracted from.

type.description: For Object and EvidenceRecord, a CURIE into a viewpoint vocabulary. For Activity, a CURIE corresponding to the ActivityType value (e.g. isom:activity_type/synthesis_edge).

viewpoint_directive_id.description: Reference to the ViewpointDirective that shaped this entity. The bootstrap meta-viewpoint and the blank-slate viewpoint are valid references; absence is not.

NegativeEvidenceRecord.title: NegativeEvidenceRecord

Object.description: Participant in reasoning. Has source artifacts, evidence records, features, observations, needs, offers, posts, communities. The thing being talked about.

action_link_ids.description: Backward pointers to ACTION_EDGE Activities involving this Object.

evidence_record_ids.description: References to EvidenceRecord entities anchoring this Object's claims.

features.description: Viewpoint-defined structured payload, serialized as a JSON string in v1. The viewpoint's vocabulary determines the shape. Later versions may use a typed Any with viewpoint-declared schemas.

generation_mode.description: Free-form descriptor of the process that generated this entity (parser name + version, viewpoint name + version, LLM model + tier).

provenance.description: Provenance description for v1. Future versions will model provenance as structured edges into the hyperDAG; for now a free-form string is accepted to allow ingestion bundles from upstream extraction tools.

scope.description: Optional but recommended. Sets the conditions under which this entity's statements apply. Unset dimensions are operationally `unspecified`, not wildcards.

should_not_claim.description: Epistemic boundaries this entity must respect. Combination of per-class defaults plus directive-imposed rules from the viewpoint.

source_artifact_refs.description: ContentReferences to the source artifacts this Object derives from.

synthesis_link_ids.description: Backward pointers to Activities that referenced this Object as input or output.

type.description: For Object and EvidenceRecord, a CURIE into a viewpoint vocabulary. For Activity, a CURIE corresponding to the ActivityType value (e.g. isom:activity_type/synthesis_edge).

viewpoint_directive_id.description: Reference to the ViewpointDirective that shaped this entity. The bootstrap meta-viewpoint and the blank-slate viewpoint are valid references; absence is not.

wiki_link_ids.description: Backward pointers to wiki statement Objects citing this Object.

Object.title: Object

ProcessingLogLineLocator.description: Line range within a processing log.

locator_type.description: Class name of the concrete Locator subclass (e.g. CharRangeLocator).

ProcessingLogLineLocator.title: ProcessingLogLineLocator

RefusalState.description: Five-state refusal taxonomy. Distinct from EpistemicStatus — RefusalState answers "did we look, and what did we find?", EpistemicStatus answers "what kind of statement is this?".
RefusalState.title: RefusalState

ReviewState.description: Epistemic maturity of a derived entity.
ReviewState.title: ReviewState

Scope.description: Composite scope. Each dimension is optional. An unset dimension is operationally `unspecified` — not a wildcard, but an honest acknowledgement that the viewpoint did not bind it.
Scope.title: Scope

SequencePositionLocator.description: Position range within a reference biological sequence.

locator_type.description: Class name of the concrete Locator subclass (e.g. CharRangeLocator).

SequencePositionLocator.title: SequencePositionLocator

TableCellLocator.description: A specific cell within an extracted table.

locator_type.description: Class name of the concrete Locator subclass (e.g. CharRangeLocator).

TableCellLocator.title: TableCellLocator

TemporalScope.description: Time window, sample age, instrument run, observation epoch.
TemporalScope.title: TemporalScope

ViewpointDirective.description: The interpretive frame under which entities are extracted. Itself an Object — a ViewpointDirective has its own viewpoint_directive_id (the bootstrap meta-viewpoint, or itself for the meta-viewpoint). Carries prompts, exemplars, vocabulary references, target schema, and the should_not_claim rules it imposes on extracted entities.

action_link_ids.description: Backward pointers to ACTION_EDGE Activities involving this Object.

directive_name.description: Human-readable name (e.g. viewpoint:materials_science:v1). Combined with content hash, this gives identity-by-declaration.

evidence_record_ids.description: References to EvidenceRecord entities anchoring this Object's claims.

features.description: Viewpoint-defined structured payload, serialized as a JSON string in v1. The viewpoint's vocabulary determines the shape. Later versions may use a typed Any with viewpoint-declared schemas.

generation_mode.description: Free-form descriptor of the process that generated this entity (parser name + version, viewpoint name + version, LLM model + tier).

imposed_should_not_claim.description: should_not_claim rules this directive imposes on every entity extracted under it. Combined with per-class defaults at extraction time.

provenance.description: Provenance description for v1. Future versions will model provenance as structured edges into the hyperDAG; for now a free-form string is accepted to allow ingestion bundles from upstream extraction tools.

scope.description: Optional but recommended. Sets the conditions under which this entity's statements apply. Unset dimensions are operationally `unspecified`, not wildcards.

should_not_claim.description: Epistemic boundaries this entity must respect. Combination of per-class defaults plus directive-imposed rules from the viewpoint.

source_artifact_refs.description: ContentReferences to the source artifacts this Object derives from.

synthesis_link_ids.description: Backward pointers to Activities that referenced this Object as input or output.

target_schema.description: Reference to the LinkML schema (or schema profile) this directive commits to.

type.description: For Object and EvidenceRecord, a CURIE into a viewpoint vocabulary. For Activity, a CURIE corresponding to the ActivityType value (e.g. isom:activity_type/synthesis_edge).

viewpoint_directive_id.description: Reference to the ViewpointDirective that shaped this entity. The bootstrap meta-viewpoint and the blank-slate viewpoint are valid references; absence is not.

wiki_link_ids.description: Backward pointers to wiki statement Objects citing this Object.

ViewpointDirective.title: ViewpointDirective
